name: rtime-agent-control
description: Read-only agent control-plane diagnostics, MCP config rendering, validation planning, and tooling inventory for rtime-assistant.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and plan rtime-assistant agent tooling and MCP configuration.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Agent Control provides read-only MCP and CLI surfaces for repository-owned tool inventory, MCP client config rendering, module validation planning, context-lane routing, and runtime source snapshots without mutating local services or secrets.
defaultPrompt: Render a standalone MCP config for rtime-agent-control.
Plan validation for the agent-control module.
